archetype: #5/#6 large lending + commercial credit union (Idaho state FISCU, >$10B), multi-state community FOM; full library seed incl. commercial + CFPB >$10B overlay
build_guardrails: CFPB direct supervision (>$10B) reflected in regulators + CFPB-OVR seed

Institution.name: Idaho Central Credit Union
regulators: Idaho Department of Finance (state charter authority)
CFPB (direct consumer-compliance supervision — assets >$10B; Reg E/P, UDAAP, TRID, HMDA, 1071, 1033)
Institution.hq: 4400 Central Way, Chubbuck, ID 83202 (HQ campus; Pocatello area)
Institution.fom: Multi-state community FOM — Idaho plus parts of Washington, Oregon, Utah, Nevada, Arizona

Product.name: Free Checking
Product.description: Consumer checking; no/low monthly fee; debit card; online/mobile.

Product.name: Membership Savings (Share)
Product.description: Primary share account establishing membership; $5 par value.

Product.name: Business Loan / Line of Credit
Product.description: Member business loans and lines of credit.

Product.name: Treasury / Cash Management
Product.description: ACH origination, positive pay, merchant services, remote deposit.

Feature.name: Online & Mobile Banking
Feature.description: Account access, transfers, applications via web and app.

Feature.name: Mobile Check Deposit
Feature.description: Remote deposit capture in the app.

Feature.name: Overdraft / Courtesy Pay
Feature.description: Optional overdraft coverage with Reg E opt-in.

Feature.name: Shared Branch / CO-OP ATM
Feature.description: CO-OP shared branching and ATM access.

Segment.name: Consumer / Retail Member
Segment.description: Individuals who live, work, worship, or attend school within ICCU's multi-state community FOM (ID/WA/OR/UT/NV/AZ).

Segment.name: Business / Commercial Member
Segment.description: Small businesses, commercial entities, ag/agribusiness, and nonprofits within the FOM; member business lending + commercial real estate.

Segment.name: Mortgage / Real-Estate Borrower
Segment.description: Members seeking home purchase, refinance, construction, land, and home-equity financing.

Segment.name: Youth / Student
Segment.description: Minor and student membership tiers and youth savings.

Channel.name: Branch Network (multi-state)
Channel.description: 60+ branch locations across Idaho with locations in WA/OR/UT/NV/AZ; full-service incl. mortgage and business banking; appointment scheduling.

Channel.name: Online Banking
Channel.description: iccu.com online banking — accounts, transfers, bill pay, applications.

Channel.name: Mobile App
Channel.description: ICCU mobile app — mobile deposit, card controls, Zelle, alerts.

Channel.name: ATM / ITM Network
Channel.description: ICCU and shared/CO-OP ATM network; interactive teller machines.

Pricing.name: Membership par value (Share)
Pricing.value: $5 par value to open membership share

Disclosure.name: Fee Schedule
Disclosure.description: Consumer fee schedule (PDF NEEDS_FI for amounts).

RuleThreshold.name: 45-day advance notice before card rate/term change
CARD Act penalty fee safe-harbor cap
12-month APR increase prohibition on existing balances
Reg II debit interchange fee cap
Reg II minimum unaffiliated network requirement
Credit card payment same-day crediting cutoff
Credit balance refund window (7 business days)
Gift card 12-month inactivity threshold before fee
National DNC registry refresh interval (31 days)
HMDA rate-spread reporting threshold above APOR
MBL Aggregate Statutory Limit (12.25% total assets)
Minimum Cybersecurity Maturity Level vs. Inherent Risk
Reg E 45-day extended investigation with provisional credit
MBL aggregate cap (12.25% assets / 1.75x net worth)
SBA size standard by NAICS code
UCC midnight deadline for check return
NCUA net worth ratio PCA thresholds
Reg E member liability caps by reporting window
Investment Concentration Limit (% assets / net worth)
Borrowing Limit (50% capital and surplus — FCU Act)

Consent.name: TCPA prior express written consent for autodialed/prerecorded marketing
CalFIPA affirmative opt-in consent for third-party financial data sharing

customer_account_note: Customer and Account node kinds intentionally empty (0) — bulk member PII is never-asked.
public_data_gaps: NEEDS_FI: exact asset size & member count — NCUA 5300 call report #63194
NEEDS_FI: NMLS ID (not parsed from public site)
NEEDS_FI: consumer + business fee-schedule amounts (PDF not parsed)
NEEDS_FI: full multi-state branch directory + cutoff times
Layer-3 verbatim disclosure text held CITATION_ONLY (no fabrication)
